summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhaiya AI final polish iteration. Backend APIs all passing (100%). Landing page UI overhaul working perfectly with typewriter effect, live demo conversation, and Wrapped teaser. Dashboard features time-based greeting, quick chat, FaceTime card, and 8-button grid all functional. Minor issues with quick links and check-in visibility.

integration_issues.issue: Progress Card quick link not found in dashboard
Check-in button not visible in current state (may be hidden due to existing check-in)

passed_tests: Landing page live demo conversation preview (8 messages)
Dashboard time-based greeting with user name
Dashboard quick chat input and send functionality
Dashboard FaceTime card clickable and navigates correctly
Dashboard 8 action buttons all present and functional
Dashboard 2/3 quick links working (Weekly Summary, Bhaiya Wrapped)
FaceTime page loads with green FaceTime button
FaceTime page shows Bhaiya avatar and 'Your AI mentor is ready'
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fixes needed: 1) Ensure Progress Card quick link is visible in dashboard, 2) Verify check-in button visibility logic. All major features working correctly.
